review: Staff review - Organizer publication -> public listing -> claim CTA slice

items.title: Move claim URL semantics out of organizers routing
items.resolution: Claim URL parsing lives in website/src/features/claims/claimRouting.ts; organizers/routing.ts keeps organizer path and claim href helpers.

items.title: Lift intake workspace tab shell out of intake/organizer
items.resolution: admin/src/features/intake/ui/IntakeWorkspaceScreen.tsx owns intake workspace tabs/header; event and organizer intake are sibling workspaces.

items.title: Separate pure public discovery projection from analytics callback wiring
items.resolution: publicDiscovery.ts no longer imports organizer analytics; ListingEventsSections decorates event action models with click tracking at the section boundary.

items.title: Deduplicate claim controllers
items.resolution: Shared claim auth, mutation, and validation seams live in website/src/features/claims/useClaimRequestMutation.ts and claimModel.ts; route and listing controllers stay thin.

items.title: Route claim URL state through React Router
items.resolution: App route shell derives ClaimRouteState from React Router location/params and injects it into ClaimPage/useClaimFlowController.

items.title: Inject listing claim panel controller for Storybook and tests
items.resolution: Listing claim sections accept a controller prop; OrganizerListingSections stories inject a mock configured controller instead of mounting Firebase auth watchers.

items.title: Add noindex not_found route and static 404 output
items.resolution: Fallback and unresolved organizer listing routes render website/src/features/notFound/NotFoundPage.tsx with noindex metadata; postbuild emits /404/ and 404.html.

items.title: Make admin organizer publishing detail URL-addressable
items.resolution: Admin navigation derives from React Router location; /organizers/:clubId opens organizer detail and selection/back actions update the URL.

items.title: Split OrganizerIntakeScreen monolith and govern intake layout shells
items.resolution: Partially remediated: OrganizerIntakeScreen no longer owns the event/organizer workspace shell, and raw intake workspace/layout/decision/source classes are enforced by web:react-component-governance primitives. Not complete: the organizer intake route still owns many embedded panel views in admin/src/features/intake/organizer/ui/OrganizerIntakeScreen.tsx.

followUp.title: Split remaining OrganizerIntakeScreen panel views into feature-owned section files
acceptance: OrganizerIntakeScreen remains the route/workspace composition entry, not the owner of every panel body.
Repeated organizer intake panel views move into named section/view files under admin/src/features/intake/organizer/ui/sections.
Existing shared admin primitives remain the only destination for reusable UI shells.
Run web:admin-feature-exports, web:admin-components, web:react-component-governance, admin typecheck, and admin build.

items.title: Replace app-shell error/notice callback threading
items.resolution: Added AdminFeedbackProvider/useAdminFeedback and moved touched organizer publishing, event publishing, organizer intake, and event intake surfaces off app-shell onError/onNotice props.

items.title: Migrate admin publishing/intake manual async state to TanStack Query
items.resolution: Organizer publishing list/detail reads use useQuery and save/publish use useMutation; organizer intake, event intake, and marketing ops row-level pending state derives from TanStack mutation state through named mutation keys.

items.title: Actually use admin react-router dependency
items.resolution: Admin App is wrapped in BrowserRouter and section navigation is derived from useLocation/useNavigate instead of hidden activeNav state.

items.title: Add website import-boundary enforcement
items.resolution: Added tool/web/check_website_import_boundaries.mjs, wired it into website pretypecheck and root web:typecheck, and codified explicit cross-feature allowlists.

items.title: Lazy-load Firebase out of SEO listing chunks
items.resolution: Static Firebase SDK imports were removed; claim/review/analytics runtime calls now dynamic-import website/src/firebase.ts, and production HostListingPage chunk verification shows no static Firebase runtime import or SDK symbols.

items.title: Collapse governed-family prose duplication
items.resolution: tool/web/check_react_component_governance.mjs owns the family list via --families-json; docs and manifest entries now point to docs/audit_registry/react_component_governance_families.json instead of duplicating prose walls.

items.title: Document scanner ratchet limits
items.resolution: Scanner help, generated family registry, architecture docs, and WEB-UI-COMPONENT-001 state that governance is a known-family blocklist and novel repeated shells must become scanner families.

items.title: Make Storybook states match rendered states
items.resolution: Claim/listing section stories now split overstated states into explicit exports. ListingReviews has separate verified, public-form, and empty exports; ListingSources has separate source-ledger and claimable-unclaimed exports. check_website_components verifies registry states appear in Storybook metadata for each component id.

items.title: Clarify route review-state vocabulary versus component story states
items.resolution: Route reviews now require stateCoverage.storybook/manual in design/website/routes.json, and MarketingRoutes stories mirror the same route-state coverage vocabulary.

items.title: Key listing view analytics effect on listing id
items.resolution: useHostListingPageController listingView analytics effect now depends on listing.id instead of generated listing object identity.
